calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Authority To Have Agent?S Legal Fees Paid From Trust
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION To Enforce Agent'S Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION To Enforce Agent'S Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ciarian O'Sullivan, Esq., in court, for Helen Omstead, Petitioner.
Jeffrey Hall, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Harold Hand, Thais Hand, and Robert Hand, Respondents.

At the outset, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. At the conclusion of argument, the court sets forth the following briefing schedule, as agreed upon by counsel in open court:

1) Mr. O'Sullivan is to file a petition/motion for authority to have legal fees paid from the Trust on or before Feb-19-2025.

2) Mr. Hall shall file any Objection/Response by Mar-12-2025.

3) Mr. O'Sullivan is to file any reply by Mar-19-2025.

The court advises that if no petition is filed by the above-referenced deadline, it will consider taking the matter off calendar or dismissing it.

The subject matter is continued to Mar-26-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Jan-29-2025): after consideration by the court, the following is approved: Mr. O'Sullivan may set the above-referenced motion for Mar-26-2025 at 9:00 a.m. to be heard concurrently with the underlying petition.

PETITION To Enforce Agent'S Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq., in court, for Helen Holmstead, Petitioner/Attorney-in-fact.
Jeff Hall, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Harold Hand, Thais Hand, and Robert Hand, Respondents.

At the outset, Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. At the court's query, Mr. O'Sullivan reports that the recent mediation did not resolve the disputes between the parties and that the lone remaining issue in this proceeding are his client's entitlement to attorneys' fees for which he intends to file a motion and requests ninety (90) days to file said motion. Mr. Hall offers argument in opposition to the instant petition.

At the conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jan-27-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Belen. Not Reported.

PETITION To Enforce Agent'S Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition To Enforce Agent?S Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan for and with Helen Omstead (by zoom).
Jeff Hall appeared by zoom for and with Harold (Ted) Hand by zoom and Robert Hand by zoom, and for Thais Hand (not present).

Discussion was held regarding Mrs. Ravetti's condition. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the issue of whether the matter should be continued, why the petition is moot, whether Mr. O'Sullivan has a right to request fees, whether the case should be dismissed, etc. The Petition to Enforce Agent's Powers Under Advanced Health Care Directive, etc. is continued to September 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court encouraged the family to quit throwing money away to the attorneys, to sit down and get together, and to put this away. Either a motion to dismiss or a status report is to be filed one week prior/by September 9, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION Petition To Enforce Agents Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To Honor Agents Authority Under Advance Health Care Directive
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan for Helen Omstead.
Jeff Hall appeared by zoom for Harold Hand, Thais Hand and Robert Hand (respondents).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that Mrs. Ravetti is doing great, that she has moved to Palm Springs and that all of the family members agree that she will do better in her home in Palm Springs. Further discussion was held regarding the issue of whether the petition is moot, whether it should be dismissed, whether there is any reason to keep it on calendar, whether it is appropriate to give it a few weeks given Mrs. Ravetti's age and medical condition, whether or not there will be a need for court intervention in the future, the issue of the parties agreeing to venue being in Riverside, etc. The Petition to Enforce Agent's Powers Under Advanced Health Care Directive, etc. is continued to May 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jeffrey M. Hall Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 430.41
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION Petition To Enforce Agents Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To Honor Agents Authority Under Advance Health Care Directive
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan appeared in person for and with Helen Omstead appeared via zoom (petitioner).
Jeff Hall appeared via zoom for Robert Hand, Harold Hand, and Thais Hand (respondent's).

Counsel presented oral arguments to support their positions and provided responses to the questions raised in the tentative rulings. Upon conclusion of argument the demurrer is overruled. A response to the petition is due on or before February 20, 2024. The Petition to Enforce, agent's powers under advance health care directive, etc., is continued to April 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wong: Not reported.

PETITION Petition To Enforce Agents Powers Under Advance Health Care Directive And To Compel Harold Hand To Honor Agents Authority Under Advance Health Care Directive
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ciarian O'Sullivan appeared in person for and with Helen Omstead (petitioner).
Jeff Hall appeared via zoom for Harold Hand, Thais Hand and Robert Hand (respondents).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Ravetti and her well-being, that Mr. O'Sullivan's' proof of service is still in the que, that Mr. Hall thinks that this matter should be heard in San Diego County, and that there has been issue with Ms. Omstead not being able to visit with her mother. A briefing schedule has been set for the filing of the Demurrer. File the Demurrer by December 22, 2023, Opposition to be filed by January 08, 2024, and hearing is set for January 31, 2024. The Court authorizes the filing of the demurrer to be set on January 31, 2024 at 2:00pm in Dept. 204. per Judge Ross Moody. Petition to enforce agent's powers under advance health care directive etc., is also continued to the same date and time.
